title: Herobrine Addon
body:
# Herobrine Addon
**This mod is an addon for the mod https://modrinth.com/datapack/lqhp-low_quality-horror-project it adds Herobrine as well as its signs**

# signs of Herobrine
![Sings of Herobrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f9bebaab3a67c602699b7123e09b7ae165ff6f64_0.webp)
**In your world you may come across signs of Herobrine such as trees without leaves, pyramids with redstone torches and random redstone torches and a Herobrine altar**

# Herobrine
![Herobrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b2db8dcba98a15fc7672c33fb992a22eb4dbb00_0.webp)

Herobrine appears at night and attacks the player. He has 40 lives. There are 2 types of Herobrine

# Herobrine Stalker
![Herobrine Stalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb22a58c9521856a755bbedd07621a46df54418b_0.webp)

The Herobrine Stalker will appear during the day, he watches the player and only moves when the player approaches him in survival mode
